_comment: T1.5 — chain-of-thought contamination markers used by eval_adapter.py.
- hard:    a single occurrence is sufficient to mark the row contaminated.
Reserved for unambiguous CoT tags emitted by DeepSeek-R1 / o1 /
other reasoning models when their thinking trace leaks into the
- soft:    a single occurrence is suggestive but not proof. Two or more
distinct soft markers in the same output trip the gate. This
keeps a legitimate 'Okay, here is...' or 'First, let me...'
from being flagged unless it co-occurs with another tell.
Edit this file to extend the gate; restart of eval_adapter.py picks up the
new patterns immediately (no rebuild). Patterns are Python regexes anchored
at the start of the output unless they include their own anchor.
